name: CHOLESTEROL GRANULOMA
definition: CHOLESTEROL CYST acquired benign chronic inflammatory mass in petrous bone

demographics.Histo: cholesterol crystals surrounded by foreign-body giant cells; embedded in fibrous
demographics.Location: in pneumatized petrous apex; (occasionally in)mastoid segment, middle ear,

distribution: in pneumatized petrous apex; (occasionally in)mastoid segment, middle ear,
discriminating_features: expansile homogeneous middle ear lesion with smooth well-defined / imperceptible bone

CT: expansile homogeneous middle ear lesion with smooth well-defined / imperceptible bone
MR: heterogeneously hyperintense signal on T2WI ← cholesterol crystals + methemoglobin
± hypointense rim on T2WI ← hemosiderin deposition / preserved rim of bone
